Catalog/Diagnostics
📦

AutoQuant 200

AutoQuant 200 Excelus Biochemistry Analyzer

Fully Automated Clinical Chemistry Analyzer with 200 Tests/Hour Throughput

DiagnosticsREF: AQ200

Fully Automated Biochemistry Analyzer with research empowered automation featuring accuracy, convenience, high precision, ease of operation, and flexibility

Technical Specifications

throughput200 tests/hour ISE optional, 300 tests/hour
sample position45
sample volume2-50 μL (Adjustable in 0.1 μL step)
reagent position45 for R1 and R2
reagent counterReagent 1: 100-350 μL (Adjustable in 1 μL step), Reagent 2: 0 or 10-350 μL (Adjustable in 1 μL step)
mixingMixing by paddle or by aspiration-dispense of reagent/sample
reaction system60 (Reusable)
wash systemOn board identity with 7 step washing system
optical systemPhotometry
light sourceTungsten halogen lamp (12V 20 W) cooled with air option for auto on-off of lamp
wavelength8 filters (340, 405, 450, 510, 546, 578, 600, 670, 700 nm)
measurement range0-3.5 Abs
resolution0.0001 Abs
calibrationK-Factor, Linear (one, two and multi-point), Logit log, Spline, Exponential
working conditionspower supply: 110/220 VAC, 50/60 Hz Max. Power 250 W | temperature: 15°C - 30°C | humidity: 40% - 85% free from water dew formation
operation systemWindows XP, Windows 7, Windows 8, Windows 10 or Write
dimensions735mm (L) x 523mm (W) x 420mm (H)
weightApprox. 55 kgs
ManufacturerMeril Diagnostics
Material_UNSPECIFIED
